flows: utente -> devices — type=association; label="associazione"; explanation="association between user and device"
devices -> config — type=association; label="configurato"; explanation="configuration association"
devices -> history — type=association; label="raccoglie informazioni"; explanation="information collection association"
devices -> alert — type=association; label="segnala"; explanation="signal association"
flow 1: utente -> devices (associazione) -> devices -> config (configurato) -> devices -> history (raccoglie informazioni) -> devices -> alert (segnala)
the diagram represents a system's entities as classes, typical of object-oriented languages.
the reason for constructing this diagram is intrinsic to the next graphic, dedicated to the actions performed by the entities (represented here through method terminology).
the main flow involves interactions between the user, device, configuration, history, and alert classes.
there are associations between the user and device, device and configuration, device and history, and device and alert classes.
accesso eseguito -> click "serre" — type=control-flow; label="->"; explanation="click action initiated"
click "serre" -> visualizzazione messaggio default — type=control-flow; label="->"; explanation="default message display"
visualizzazione messaggio default -> almeno 1 serra associata — type=control-flow; label="->"; explanation="check for associated greenhouses"
almeno 1 serra associata -> visualizzazione elenco serre — type=control-flow; label="->"; explanation="display list of greenhouses"
almeno 1 serra associata -> no — type=control-flow; label="no"; explanation="no associated greenhouses"
flow 1: accesso eseguito -> click "serre" -> visualizzazione messaggio default -> almeno 1 serra associata -> visualizzazione elenco serre
this activity diagram models the process of accessing a greenhouse list.
the user initiates access, clicks on "serre" (greenhouses), and checks for associated greenhouses.
if at least one greenhouse is associated, the list of greenhouses is displayed.
if no greenhouses are associated, a default message is displayed.
the process ends if no greenhouses are associated.
accesso eseguito -> click "add devices" — type=control-flow; label="->"; explanation="click action"
click "add devices" -> campo inserito correttamente — type=control-flow; label="->"; explanation="field check"
campo inserito correttamente -> valore errato — type=control-flow; label="no"; explanation="incorrect value detected"
campo inserito correttamente -> operazione eseguita — type=control-flow; label="si"; explanation="correct value detected"
flow 1: accesso eseguito -> click "add devices" -> campo inserito correttamente -> operazione eseguita

this diagram models the process of adding devices, starting with accessing the system. the user clicks the "add devices" button, which triggers a check for correct field insertion. if the field is inserted correctly, the operation proceeds; otherwise, an invalid value is detected, leading back to the field check.
accesso eseguito -> serra connessa — type=transition; label=""; explanation="access initiated"
serra connessa -> click "configuration" — type=transition; label=""; explanation="greenhouse connected"
click "configuration" -> valore errato — type=transition; label=""; explanation="click configuration button"
valore errato -> campi inseriti correttamente — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="value error detected"
campi inseriti correttamente -> campi inseriti correttamente — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="fields entered correctly"
campi inseriti correttamente -> operazione eseguita — type=transition; label=""; explanation="operation executed"
flow 1: accesso eseguito -> serra connessa -> click "configuration" -> valore errato -> campi inseriti correttamente -> campi inseriti correttamente -> operazione eseguita
this activity diagram models the process of modifying greenhouse settings.
the main flow starts with accessing the system, then connecting the greenhouse.
the user clicks the "configuration" button.
a decision checks for value errors.
if fields are entered correctly, the operation is executed.
if fields are not entered correctly, the process loops back to the fields entry check.
an error path exists if a value error is detected, leading back to the fields entry check.
validations: almeno 1 serra associata: no -> flow ends
almeno 1 serra associata: si -> visualizzazione elenco serre
valore errato -> campi inseriti correttamente: no
campi inseriti correttamente -> campi inseriti correttamente: si
